articles.title: iOS 26.5 is here, iOS 27 is coming, and Android is trying to get ahead of Apple Intelligence, on the AppleInsider Podcast
articles.description: There was no sign of the improved Apple Intelligence in this week's launch of iOS 26.5, which must've been a relief to Google as it talked up its apparently new but seemingly very familiar AI features in Android. Apple's iOS 26.5 is here, but the improved Siri is not We've long suspected that Apple will save its Apple Intelligence and especially Siri features to iOS 27 , since that's shortly due to be announced at WWDC 2026. But the lack of any improvement with iOS 26.5 does mean that Apple has now left Siri broken for more than a year. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Trump-Xi summit: How AI, semiconductors shaped US-China talks despite no breakthrough deals
articles.description: The Trump-Xi meeting may have lacked a blockbuster trade agreement, but technology quietly dominated the summit. From AI chips and semiconductors to Tesla and Nvidia’s growing dependence on China, the visit underscored how the future of US-China relations is increasingly being shaped by artificial intelligence, computing power and supply chains.

articles.title: Nintendo could be coming to India with a console that turns ten next year
articles.description: Nintendo is reportedly planning an official India launch for early 2027, with the Switch 1 priced at around Rs 20,000 and Redington handling distribution. First-party titles like Breath of the Wild and Mario Kart are expected to follow. The catch: the Switch 2 has already sold nearly 20 million units globally, is already available in India via grey market, and the Switch 1 is old enough to have earned its own wave of nostalgia.

The folks over at Android Authority were able to get it running on a Pixel 9 using the latest Android Canary 2605 build. articles.title: AI predicts and Medicare pays; a new model could change everyday healthcare
articles.description: Medicare has introduced a new payment model that could make it easier for AI tools to become part of everyday healthcare. By paying for care delivered beyond clinic visits, the shift supports technologies that manage follow-ups, monitoring, and coordination. The change may help AI move from pilot projects into routine patient care.

Motorola India has confirmed that the Moto G37 and G37 Power will launch in the country on May 19. Both smartphones will be available through Flipkart, Motorola’s official online store, and select offline retail outlets. articles.title: Google may cut free storage to 5GB but there is a way users can get full 15GB
articles.description: Google appears to be testing a new policy that reduces free cloud storage for new accounts to 5GB. Users can unlock the full 15GB by linking a phone number, a move Google states is to ensure one pool per person and prevent bots. Existing accounts are unlikely to be affected by this change.
